turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling to reschedule my appointment that I have this Thursday to sometime next week.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, no,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to create a demo patient profile first?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name to get started.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July 4, 2000.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my date of birth is March 14, 1992. I need to move my appointment from this Thursday to sometime next week.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You have an appointment scheduled for Tuesday, June 30th.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: at 9 a.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: with Dr. Zbigniew Bukowski at Nashville 220 Athens Way.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is this the appointment you want to move to next week?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my appointment is for this Thursday, not Tuesday. I'd like to move that Thursday appointment to next week. Could you help me find a new time?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I only see an appointment for Tuesday, June 30th at 9 a.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Are you asking to move this appointment?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Or do you have another one scheduled for this Thursday?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m certain I have one set for Thursday. Could you double-check the schedule for any appointment this Thursday under my name, Jordan Miller?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I checked your upcoming appointments and only see one scheduled for Tuesday.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: June 30th at 9 a.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: There are no other appointments listed for this Thursday under your name.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, let's go ahead and move that June 30th appointment to next week. What days and times are available?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to move the June 30th appointment to next week instead?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for available appointments next week to move your June 30th visit.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, take your

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I found openings next week on Monday, July 6th.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: at 10 a.m., 2 p.m., and 3.30 p.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would any of these times work for you, or would you like to look for a different day or time?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I think the 10 a.m. slot on Monday, July 6th would work well. Let’s go with that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Before I reschedule...

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I just have a

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Can you tell me the reason you need to move your appointment?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For example...

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is it a schedule conflict, illness, or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: It's a schedule conflict. I won't be available this Thursday, so I need to push it to next week. That's all.
